title: GEEPAS Illuminating Electric Kettle | 1.7L Cordless Jug Kettle with LED Lighting for Hot Water Tea or Coffee | Boil Dry Protection & Auto Shut Off | Swivel Base with Auto Lid Open | 2200W White
features: ✅ FAST AND EFFICIENT BOIL TECHNOLOGY – Equipped with 2200W normal boil power, this electric kettle heats water within minutes for your tea, coffee, or cooking needs. Save valuable time every morning with its powerful heating element.

✅ SAFETY-FIRST DESIGN WITH AUTO SHUT-OFF-The advanced boil-dry protection prevents the smart kettle from operating without water, ensuring safety and preventing damage. Auto shut-off activates as soon as the water reaches boiling point, giving you peace of mind.

✅ LARGE 1.7L CAPACITY WITH CLEAR WATER LEVEL GAUGE-Boil up to 8 cups of water in one go with the generous 1.7L capacity, suitable for families or entertaining guests. The transparent water level window in portable kettle lets you measure accurately to avoid wasting energy. Always know exactly how much water you’re boiling for perfect portions.

✅ CORDLESS CONVENIENCE WITH SWIVEL BASE-Easily lift and serve from the fast boil kettle without dealing with tangled cords thanks to the 360-degree swivel base. This cordless design allows smooth handling for both right and left-handed users. Store neatly with the built-in cord storage feature for a tidy countertop.

✅ EASY CLEANING WITH REMOVABLE WASHABLE FILTER-Keep your drinks tasting pure with the anti-scale filter in cordless electric kettle that removes limescale particles effectively. The removable filter is washable, helping maintain your kettle’s performance and prolong its lifespan.

✅ MODERN LED INDICATOR AND ONE-TOUCH LID OPENING-Blue LED lighting beautifully illuminates the boiling process, so you can visually track heating even in low light. The one-touch lid opening feature in coffee kettle makes filling and cleaning quick and effortless. Adds a sleek, modern look to any kitchen décor.

✅ DURABLE BPA-FREE MATERIALS-Constructed with high-quality BPA-free components, this tea kettle is built to last and safe for daily use. The robust materials resist discoloration and wear, keeping your kettle looking new. Perfect for health-conscious buyers seeking a reliable and hygienic appliance.

✅ SMART CORD STORAGE AND COMPACT DESIGN-The integrated cord storage keeps your kitchen space neat and clutter-free. Compact yet spacious, this quick boil kettle fits easily on any kitchen counter without sacrificing capacity.
description: Product Description 1.7L WATER CAPACITY The 1.7L large capacity allows this kettle to serve about 8 cups of water for you and your family each time. AUTO LID OPENING Designed with a simple one touch, push button opening lid, enabling you to quickly open with one hand when you want to refill your kettle. BOIL-DRY PROTECTION Automatic shut off function upon boiling and the boil-dry protection prevents it boiling if there is insufficient water present. 360° ROTATIONAL BASE The Kettle can be tidied away at your convenience & the handy 360° base means it can be comfortably used by right & left-handed people. BLUE ILLUMINATED LED LIGHT Sleek and stylish design with clear housing, give you a precise observation with water volume and boiling process, and while the kettle will illuminate blue during heating water - An elegant addition to your kitchen.
